title: Sous Vide Biber Steak with Tabbouleh
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring sous vide biber steak served with a refreshing tabbouleh salad.

ingredients.name: Sous vide bag
ingredients.notes: food-safe and suitable for sous vide

instructions: Season the biber steak with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the biber steak for 1-2 minutes per side, then transfer to a sous vide bag.
Seal the sous vide bag and cook in the sous vide machine at 130°F (54°C) for 1 hour.
While the steak is cooking, prepare the tabbouleh according to package instructions.
Remove the steak from the sous vide bag and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the steak against the grain and serve with the tabbouleh salad.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
